title: hedyotis schlechtendahliana var. cordata
intro: Hedyotis schlechtendahliana var. cordata, also known as the Cordate Hedyotis, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hedyotis schlechtendahliana var. cordata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and sore throat, and treat various respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas or infusions, and it can also be used as a poultice or salve to apply topically for skin irritations and wounds.
